title: fragaria alba
intro: Fragaria alba, also known as the white strawberry or white wood strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This perennial herb has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The health benefits of Fragaria alba include its ability to support immune function, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant, protecting the body from oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Fragaria alba can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
